            </select>
          </div>

          <!-- Sliders Grid -->
          <div class="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 gap-4">
            <!-- Color Count -->
            <div>
              <div class="flex items-center justify-between">
                <label for="count" class="form-label mb-0">Colors</label>
                <output id="countOutput" for="count" class="text-xs text-white/65 font-mono">5</output>
              </div>
              <input type="range" id="count" min="3" max="7" value="5" step="1" class="mt-2 w-full" aria-describedby="countDesc" />
              <p id="countDesc" class="sr-only">Number of colors to generate, from 3 to 7</p>
            </div>

            <!-- Hue Drift -->
            <div>
              <div class="flex items-center justify-between">
                <label for="drift" class="form-label mb-0">Hue Drift</label>
                <output id="driftOutput" for="drift" class="text-xs text-white/65 font-mono">24°</output>
              </div>
              <input type="range" id="drift" min="6" max="60" value="24" step="1" class="mt-2 w-full" aria-describedby="driftDesc" />
              <p id="driftDesc" class="sr-only">Degrees of hue separation between colors</p>
            </div>

            <!-- Saturation -->
            <div>
              <div class="flex items-center justify-between">
                <label for="sat" class="form-label mb-0">Saturation</label>
                <output id="satOutput" for="sat" class="text-xs text-white/65 font-mono">80%</output>
              </div>
              <input type="range" id="sat" min="20" max="100" value="80" step="1" class="mt-2 w-full" aria-describedby="satDesc" />
              <p id="satDesc" class="sr-only">Color intensity from 20% to 100%</p>
            </div>

            <!-- Lightness -->
            <div>
              <div class="flex items-center justify-between">
                <label for="lit" class="form-label mb-0">Lightness</label>
                <output id="litOutput" for="lit" class="text-xs text-white/65 font-mono">52%</output>
              </div>
              <input type="range" id="lit" min="18" max="78" value="52" step="1" class="mt-2 w-full" aria-describedby="litDesc" />
              <p id="litDesc" class="sr-only">Color brightness from 18% to 78%</p>
            </div>
          </div>

          <!-- Action Buttons -->
          <div class="flex flex-col sm:flex-row gap-3 pt-2">
            <button type="submit" class="btn btn-primary" aria-keyshortcuts="Alt+G">
              Generate Palette
            </button>
            <button type="button" id="copyJsonBtn" class="btn btn-ghost">
              Copy JSON
            </button>
          </div>
        </form>

        <!-- Export Section -->
        <div class="mt-6">
          <div class="flex items-center justify-between">
            <h3 class="text-sm font-semibold">CSS Export</h3>
            <span class="text-xs text-white/50">Ready for :root</span>
          </div>
          <label for="exportCode" class="sr-only">Generated CSS code</label>
          <textarea id="exportCode" class="mt-2 w-full min-h-[140px] rounded-xl bg-black/20 border border-white/10 px-3 py-3 text-xs font-mono text-white/85 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-white/15" readonly spellcheck="false" aria-describedby="exportHelp"></textarea>
          <p id="exportHelp" class="mt-2 text-xs text-white/60">
            Keyboard: <span class="kbd">Alt+R</span> Randomize ·
            <span class="kbd">Alt+G</span> Generate ·
            <span class="kbd">Alt+C</span> Copy CSS
          </p>
        </div>
      </section>

      <!-- Palette Display -->
      <section class="lg:col-span-7 glass p-5 sm:p-6" aria-labelledby="palette-heading">

          <div>
            <h2 id="palette-heading" class="text-lg font-semibold">Generated Palette</h2>
            <p class="text-sm text-white/70">
              Click any swatch to copy its hex value.
            </p>
          </div>
          <div class="flex items-center gap-2" role="radiogroup" aria-label="View mode">
            <button type="button" id="viewGrid" class="btn btn-ghost px-3 py-2 text-xs" role="radio" aria-checked="true">
              Grid
            </button>

              List

        <!-- Palette Container -->
        <div id="palette" class="mt-5 palette-grid" role="list" aria-label="Color palette swatches" aria-live="polite">
          <!-- Cards injected by JavaScript -->
        </div>

        <!-- Info Panel -->
        <div class="mt-6 grid grid-cols-1 xl:grid-cols-2 gap-4">
          <!-- Contrast Guide -->
          <div class="glass p-4" style="background: rgba(255,255,255,0.03);">
            <h3 class="text-sm font-semibold">Accessibility Guide</h3>
            <dl class="mt-3 space-y-2 text-sm">
              <div class="flex items-center justify-between">
                <dt class="text-white/70">AA Large Text (3:1)</dt>
                <dd><span class="badge badge-warning">Minimum</span></dd>
              </div>
              <div class="flex items-center justify-between">
                <dt class="text-white/70">AA Normal Text (4.5:1)</dt>
                <dd><span class="badge badge-success">Good</span></dd>
              </div>
              <div class="flex items-center justify-between">
                <dt class="text-white/70">AAA Normal Text (7:1)</dt>
                <dd><span class="badge badge-success">Excellent</span></dd>
              </div>
            </dl>
          </div>

          <!-- Live Preview -->
          <div id="livePreview" class="rounded-[var(--radius-lg)] p-4 sm:p-5" style="background: linear-gradient(160deg, color-mix(in oklab, var(--c1) 22%, #0b1020), color-mix(in oklab, var(--c5) 18%, #0b1020)); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.12);" aria-label="Live UI preview using palette colors">
            <div class="flex items-center gap-3">
              <div class="w-10 h-10 rounded-xl" style="background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--c1), var(--c3)); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.16);" aria-hidden="true"></div>
              <div>
                <div class="text-sm font-semibold">Preview Component</div>
                <div class="text-xs text-white/65">Uses your palette colors</div>
              </div>
            </div>

            <div class="mt-4 grid grid-cols-2 gap-2">
              <button type="button" class="px-3 py-2 rounded-xl text-sm" style="background: var(--c1); color: white; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.2);" tabindex="-1" aria-hidden="true">
                Primary
              </button>
              <button type="button" class="px-3 py-2 rounded-xl text-sm" style="background: var(--c2); color: white; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.2);" tabindex="-1" aria-hidden="true">
                Success
              </button>
              <button type="button" class="px-3 py-2 rounded-xl text-sm" style="background: var(--c4); color: black; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.2);" tabindex="-1" aria-hidden="true">
                Warning
              </button>
              <button type="button" class="px-3 py-2 rounded-xl text-sm" style="background: var(--c5); color: white; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.2);" tabindex="-1" aria-hidden="true">
                Danger
              </button>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </section>
    </main>

    <!-- Footer -->
    <footer class="mt-8 text-xs text-white/55">
      <div class="flex flex-col sm:flex-row sm:items-center justify-between gap-2">
        <p>Accessible color palette generator with WCAG contrast checking.</p>
        <p>Made with ❤️ by OathanRex </p>
      </div>

  <!-- Toast Notification -->
  <div id="toast" class="toast" role="status" aria-live="polite" aria-atomic="true"></div>

  <script>
    'use strict';
    // ============================================
    // CONFIGURATION
    // ============================================
    const CONFIG = Object.freeze({
      palette: {
        maxColors: 7,
        variablePrefix: '--c',
        defaultCount: 5,
      },
      lightness: {
        min: 8,
        max: 92,
        variance: 26,
      },
      random: {
        saturation: {
          base: 70,
          range: 25
        },
        lightness: {
          base: 42,
          range: 18
        },
      },
      contrast: {
        aa: 4.5,
        aaa: 7.0,
        aaLarge: 3.0,
      },
      debounce: {
        inputDelay: 50,
        renderDelay: 16,
      },
      storage: {
        key: 'colorPaletteState',
        version: 1,
      },
    });
    // ============================================
    // UTILITY FUNCTIONS
    // ============================================
    const clamp = (value, min, max) => Math.min(max, Math.max(min, value));
    const mod = (n, m) => ((n % m) + m) % m;

    function debounce(fn, delay) {
      let timeoutId = null;
      return function debounced(...args) {
        if (timeoutId) clearTimeout(timeoutId);
        timeoutId = setTimeout(() => {
          timeoutId = null;
          fn.apply(this, args);
        }, delay);
      };
    }

    function sanitizeHex(value) {
      if (typeof value !== 'string') return '#000000';
      const match = value.trim().match(/^#?([0-9A-Fa-f]{3}|[0-9A-Fa-f]{6})$/);
      if (!match) return '#000000';
      const hex = match[1];
      const normalized = hex.length === 3 ?
        hex.split('').map(c => c + c).join('') :
        hex;
      return `#${normalized.toUpperCase()}`;
    }
    // ============================================
    // COLOR SERVICE
    // ============================================
    const ColorService = (() => {
      function hexToRgb(hex) {
        const normalized = String(hex).trim().replace(/^#/, '');
        if (!/^([0-9A-Fa-f]{3}|[0-9A-Fa-f]{6})$/.test(normalized)) {
          return null;
        }
        const full = normalized.length === 3 ?
          normalized.split('').map(c => c + c).join('') :
          normalized;
        const int = parseInt(full, 16);
        return {
          r: (int >> 16) & 255,
          g: (int >> 8) & 255,
          b: int & 255,
        };
      }

      function rgbToHex(r, g, b) {
        const toHex = v => clamp(Math.round(v), 0, 255).toString(16).padStart(2, '0');
        return `#${toHex(r)}${toHex(g)}${toHex(b)}`.toUpperCase();
      }

      function rgbToHsl(r, g, b) {
        r /= 255;
        g /= 255;
        b /= 255;
        const max = Math.max(r, g, b);
        const min = Math.min(r, g, b);
        const l = (max + min) / 2;
        const d = max - min;
        if (d === 0) {
          return {
            h: 0,
            s: 0,
            l: l * 100
          };
        }
        const s = l > 0.5 ? d / (2 - max - min) : d / (max + min);
        let h;
        switch (max) {
          case r:
            h = ((g - b) / d + (g < b ? 6 : 0)) * 60;
            break;
          case g:
            h = ((b - r) / d + 2) * 60;
            break;
          case b:
            h = ((r - g) / d + 4) * 60;
            break;
        }
        return {
          h,
          s: s * 100,
          l: l * 100
        };
      }

      function hslToRgb(h, s, l) {
        h = mod(h, 360);
        s = clamp(s, 0, 100) / 100;
        l = clamp(l, 0, 100) / 100;
        const c = (1 - Math.abs(2 * l - 1)) * s;
        const x = c * (1 - Math.abs(((h / 60) % 2) - 1));
        const m = l - c / 2;
        let r, g, b;
        if (h < 60) {
          r = c;
          g = x;
          b = 0;
        } else if (h < 120) {
          r = x;
          g = c;
          b = 0;
        } else if (h < 180) {
          r = 0;
          g = c;
          b = x;
        } else if (h < 240) {
          r = 0;
          g = x;
          b = c;
        } else if (h < 300) {
          r = x;
          g = 0;
          b = c;
        } else {
          r = c;
          g = 0;
          b = x;
        }
        return {
          r: Math.round((r + m) * 255),
          g: Math.round((g + m) * 255),
          b: Math.round((b + m) * 255),
        };
      }

      function hslToHex(h, s, l) {
        const {
          r,
          g,
          b
        } = hslToRgb(h, s, l);
        return rgbToHex(r, g, b);
      }

      function relativeLuminance({
        r,
        g,
        b
      }) {
        const [rs, gs, bs] = [r, g, b].map(v => {
          v /= 255;
          return v <= 0.03928 ? v / 12.92 : Math.pow((v + 0.055) / 1.055, 2.4);
        });
        return 0.2126 * rs + 0.7152 * gs + 0.0722 * bs;
      }

      function contrastRatio(hex1, hex2) {
        const rgb1 = hexToRgb(hex1);
        const rgb2 = hexToRgb(hex2);
        if (!rgb1 || !rgb2) return 1;
        const L1 = relativeLuminance(rgb1);
        const L2 = relativeLuminance(rgb2);
        const lighter = Math.max(L1, L2);
        const darker = Math.min(L1, L2);
        return (lighter + 0.05) / (darker + 0.05);
      }

      function bestTextColor(bgHex) {
        const whiteContrast = contrastRatio(bgHex, '#FFFFFF');
        const blackContrast = contrastRatio(bgHex, '#000000');
        return whiteContrast >= blackContrast ?
          {
            hex: '#FFFFFF',
            ratio: whiteContrast
          } :
          {
            hex: '#000000',
            ratio: blackContrast
          };
      }

      function randomHex() {
        const {
          saturation,
          lightness
        } = CONFIG.random;
        const h = Math.floor(Math.random() * 360);
        const s = saturation.base + Math.floor(Math.random() * saturation.range);
        const l = lightness.base + Math.floor(Math.random() * lightness.range);
        return hslToHex(h, s, l);
      }

      function formatHsl(hsl) {
        return `hsl(${Math.round(hsl.h)} ${Math.round(hsl.s)}% ${Math.round(hsl.l)}%)`;
      }
      return Object.freeze({
        hexToRgb,
        rgbToHex,
        rgbToHsl,
        hslToRgb,
        hslToHex,
        relativeLuminance,
        contrastRatio,
        bestTextColor,
        randomHex,
        formatHsl,
      });
    })();
    // ============================================
    // PALETTE GENERATOR
    // ============================================
    const PaletteGenerator = (() => {
      const strategies = {
        analogous(baseHue, sat, lit, count, drift) {
          const halfSpan = ((count - 1) * drift) / 2;
          return Array.from({
            length: count
          }, (_, i) => ({
            h: mod(baseHue - halfSpan + i * drift, 360),
            s: sat,
            l: lit,
          }));
        },
        complementary(baseHue, sat, lit, count) {
          if (count === 1) return [{
            h: baseHue,
            s: sat,
            l: lit
          }];
          return Array.from({
            length: count
          }, (_, i) => ({
            h: mod(baseHue + (180 * i) / (count - 1), 360),
            s: sat,
            l: lit,
          }));
        },
        split(baseHue, sat, lit, count, drift) {
          const angles = [0, 180 - drift * 2, 180 + drift * 2];
          return Array.from({
            length: count
          }, (_, i) => ({
            h: mod(baseHue + angles[i % 3], 360),
            s: sat,
            l: lit,
          }));
        },
        triadic(baseHue, sat, lit, count) {
          const angles = [0, 120, 240];
          return Array.from({
            length: count
          }, (_, i) => ({
            h: mod(baseHue + angles[i % 3], 360),
            s: sat,
            l: lit,
          }));
        },
        tetradic(baseHue, sat, lit, count) {
          const angles = [0, 90, 180, 270];
          return Array.from({
            length: count
          }, (_, i) => ({
            h: mod(baseHue + angles[i % 4], 360),
            s: sat,
            l: lit,
          }));
        },
        monochrome(baseHue, sat, lit, count) {
          const {
            min,
            max,
            variance
          } = CONFIG.lightness;
          const minL = clamp(lit - variance, min, max);
          const maxL = clamp(lit + variance, min, max);
          return Array.from({
            length: count
          }, (_, i) => ({
            h: baseHue,
            s: sat,
            l: count === 1 ? lit : minL + ((maxL - minL) * i) / (count - 1),
          }));
        },
        shades(baseHue, sat, lit, count) {
          const maxL = clamp(lit, 25, 80);
          const minL = 10;
          return Array.from({
            length: count
          }, (_, i) => ({
            h: baseHue,
            s: clamp(sat - 10, 10, 100),
            l: count === 1 ? lit : maxL - ((maxL - minL) * i) / (count - 1),
          }));
        },
        tints(baseHue, sat, lit, count) {
          const minL = clamp(lit, 20, 75);
          const maxL = 92;
          return Array.from({
            length: count
          }, (_, i) => ({
            h: baseHue,
            s: clamp(sat - 14, 10, 100),
            l: count === 1 ? lit : minL + ((maxL - minL) * i) / (count - 1),
          }));
        },
      };

      function generate({
        baseHex,
        type,
        count,
        drift,
        sat,
        lit
      }) {
        const rgb = ColorService.hexToRgb(baseHex);
        if (!rgb) return [];
        const {
          h: baseHue
        } = ColorService.rgbToHsl(rgb.r, rgb.g, rgb.b);
        const strategy = strategies[type] || strategies.analogous;
        const hslColors = strategy(baseHue, sat, lit, count, drift);
        return hslColors.map(hsl => ({
          ...hsl,
          hex: ColorService.hslToHex(hsl.h, hsl.s, hsl.l),
        }));
      }

      function getSchemeTypes() {
        return Object.keys(strategies);
      }
      return Object.freeze({
        generate,
        getSchemeTypes
      });
    })();
    // ============================================
    // TOAST SERVICE
    // ============================================
    const Toast = (() => {
      let element = null;
      let timeoutId = null;
      return {
        init(el) {
          element = el;
        },
        show(message, duration = 1400) {
          if (!element) return;
          if (timeoutId) {
            clearTimeout(timeoutId);
          }
          element.textContent = message;
          element.classList.add('show');
          timeoutId = setTimeout(() => {
            this.hide();
          }, duration);
        },
        hide() {
          if (timeoutId) {
            clearTimeout(timeoutId);
            timeoutId = null;
          }
          element?.classList.remove('show');
        },
      };
    })();
    // ============================================
    // CLIPBOARD SERVICE
    // ============================================
    const ClipboardService = {
      async copy(text) {
        try {
          if (navigator.clipboard?.writeText) {
            await navigator.clipboard.writeText(text);
            return true;
          }
          return this.fallbackCopy(text);
        } catch (error) {
          console.error('Clipboard copy failed:', error);
          return this.fallbackCopy(text);
        }
      },
      fallbackCopy(text) {
        const textarea = document.createElement('textarea');
        textarea.value = text;
        textarea.style.cssText = 'position:fixed;opacity:0;pointer-events:none;left:-9999px';
        document.body.appendChild(textarea);
        textarea.select();
        let success = false;
        try {
          success = document.execCommand('copy');
        } catch (e) {
          console.error('Fallback copy failed:', e);
        }
        textarea.remove();
        return success;
      },
    };
    // ============================================
    // STATE MANAGER
    // ============================================
    const StateManager = (() => {
      const {
        key: STORAGE_KEY,
        version
      } = CONFIG.storage;
      let state = {
        baseHex: '#6D28D9',
        scheme: 'analogous',
        count: 5,
        drift: 24,
        saturation: 80,
        lightness: 52,
        viewMode: 'grid',
        palette: [],
      };
      const subscribers = new Set();

      function notify() {
        const currentState = {
          ...state
        };
        subscribers.forEach(callback => callback(currentState));
      }

      function save() {
        try {
          const data = {
            version,
            state
          };
          localStorage.setItem(STORAGE_KEY, JSON.stringify(data));
        } catch (e) {
          console.warn('Failed to save state:', e);
        }
      }

      function load() {
        try {
          const saved = localStorage.getItem(STORAGE_KEY);
          if (saved) {
            const {
              version: savedVersion,
              state: savedState
            } = JSON.parse(saved);
            if (savedVersion === version) {
              state = {
                ...state,
                ...savedState
              };
            }
          }
        } catch (e) {
          console.warn('Failed to load state:', e);
        }
      }
      return Object.freeze({
        init() {
          load();
          return {
            ...state
          };
        },
        get() {
          return {
            ...state
          };
        },
        set(updates) {
          state = {
            ...state,
            ...updates
          };
          notify();
          save();
        },
        subscribe(callback) {
          subscribers.add(callback);
          return () => subscribers.delete(callback);
        },
      });
    })();
    // ============================================
    // DOM REFERENCES
    // ============================================
    const elements = {
      root: document.documentElement,
      form: document.getElementById('paletteForm'),
      baseColor: document.getElementById('baseColor'),
      baseHex: document.getElementById('baseHex'),
      scheme: document.getElementById('scheme'),
      count: document.getElementById('count'),
      drift: document.getElementById('drift'),
      sat: document.getElementById('sat'),
      lit: document.getElementById('lit'),
      countOutput: document.getElementById('countOutput'),
      driftOutput: document.getElementById('driftOutput'),
      satOutput: document.getElementById('satOutput'),
      litOutput: document.getElementById('litOutput'),
      palette: document.getElementById('palette'),
      exportCode: document.getElementById('exportCode'),
      randomBtn: document.getElementById('randomBtn'),
      copyCssBtn: document.getElementById('copyCssBtn'),
      copyJsonBtn: document.getElementById('copyJsonBtn'),
      viewGrid: document.getElementById('viewGrid'),
      viewList: document.getElementById('viewList'),
      toast: document.getElementById('toast'),
    };
    // ============================================
    // PALETTE RENDERER
    // ============================================
    const PaletteRenderer = (() => {
      let currentItems = [];
      let viewMode = 'grid';

      function setViewMode(mode) {
        viewMode = mode;
        elements.palette.className = mode === 'list' ? 'mt-5 palette-list' : 'mt-5 palette-grid';
        elements.viewGrid.setAttribute('aria-checked', mode === 'grid');
        elements.viewList.setAttribute('aria-checked', mode === 'list');
      }

      function createCard(item, index) {
        const textColor = ColorService.bestTextColor(item.hex);
        const ratio = textColor.ratio;
        const level = ratio >= CONFIG.contrast.aaa ? 'AAA' : ratio >= CONFIG.contrast.aa ? 'AA' : 'Low';
        const badgeClass = level === 'AAA' ? 'badge-success' : level === 'AA' ? 'badge-warning' : 'badge-error';
        const card = document.createElement('article');
        card.className = 'palette-card';
        card.setAttribute('role', 'listitem');
        const swatch = document.createElement('button');
        swatch.type = 'button';
        swatch.className = 'swatch';
        swatch.style.setProperty('--swatch-color', item.hex);
        swatch.setAttribute('aria-label', `Copy ${item.hex} to clipboard. Contrast ratio: ${ratio.toFixed(1)} to 1, ${level} compliance.`);
        swatch.dataset.color = item.hex;
        const overlay = document.createElement('div');
        overlay.className = 'swatch-overlay';
        overlay.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true');
        const indexBadge = document.createElement('span');
        indexBadge.className = 'badge';
        indexBadge.style.cssText = 'background: rgba(0,0,0,0.4); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.2);';
        indexBadge.textContent = `c${index + 1}`;
        const contrastBadge = document.createElement('span');
        contrastBadge.className = `badge ${badgeClass}`;
        contrastBadge.textContent = `${level} · ${ratio.toFixed(1)}`;
        overlay.append(indexBadge, contrastBadge);
        swatch.appendChild(overlay);
        const meta = document.createElement('div');
        meta.className = 'card-meta';
        const hexRow = document.createElement('div');
        hexRow.className = 'flex items-center justify-between gap-2';
        const hexValue = document.createElement('code');
        hexValue.className = 'text-sm font-mono text-white/90';
        hexValue.textContent = item.hex;
        const copyBtn = document.createElement('button');
        copyBtn.type = 'button';
        copyBtn.className = 'btn btn-ghost px-3 py-1 text-xs';
        copyBtn.textContent = 'Copy';
        copyBtn.dataset.action = 'copy';
        copyBtn.dataset.color = item.hex;
        copyBtn.setAttribute('aria-label', `Copy ${item.hex}`);
        hexRow.append(hexValue, copyBtn);
        const infoRow = document.createElement('div');
        infoRow.className = 'mt-2 grid grid-cols-2 gap-2 text-xs';
        const hslInfo = document.createElement('div');
        hslInfo.className = 'text-white/60';
        hslInfo.innerHTML = `<span class="text-white/40">HSL</span> <span class="font-mono">${ColorService.formatHsl(item)}</span>`;
        const textInfo = document.createElement('div');
        textInfo.className = 'text-white/60';
        textInfo.innerHTML = `<span class="text-white/40">Text</span> <span class="font-mono">${textColor.hex}</span>`;
        infoRow.append(hslInfo, textInfo);
        const sample = document.createElement('div');
        sample.className = 'color-sample';
        sample.style.cssText = `background: ${item.hex}; color: ${textColor.hex};`;
        sample.innerHTML = `
          <div class="text-sm font-semibold">Sample Text</div>
          <div class="text-xs opacity-85">Preview on this swatch</div>
        `;
        meta.append(hexRow, infoRow, sample);
        card.append(swatch, meta);
        return card;
      }

      function render(items) {
        currentItems = items;
        const fragment = document.createDocumentFragment();
        items.forEach((item, index) => {
          fragment.appendChild(createCard(item, index));
        });
        elements.palette.innerHTML = '';
        elements.palette.appendChild(fragment);
      }
      // Event delegation for palette interactions
      elements.palette.addEventListener('click', async (event) => {
        const target = event.target;
        // Swatch click
        const swatch = target.closest('.swatch');
        if (swatch) {
          const color = swatch.dataset.color;
          const success = await ClipboardService.copy(color);
          Toast.show(success ? `Copied ${color}` : 'Copy failed');
          return;
        }
        // Copy button click
        const copyBtn = target.closest('[data-action="copy"]');
        if (copyBtn) {
          const color = copyBtn.dataset.color;
          const success = await ClipboardService.copy(color);
          Toast.show(success ? `Copied ${color}` : 'Copy failed');
        }
      });
      return {
        render,
        setViewMode
      };
    })();
    // ============================================
    // APPLICATION CONTROLLER
    // ============================================
    const App = (() => {
      function updateOutputs() {
        elements.countOutput.textContent = elements.count.value;
        elements.driftOutput.textContent = `${elements.drift.value}°`;
        elements.satOutput.textContent = `${elements.sat.value}%`;
        elements.litOutput.textContent = `${elements.lit.value}%`;
      }

      function getFormSettings() {
        const baseHex = sanitizeHex(elements.baseHex.value) || elements.baseColor.value;
        return {
          baseHex,
          type: elements.scheme.value,
          count: parseInt(elements.count.value, 10),
          drift: parseInt(elements.drift.value, 10),
          sat: parseInt(elements.sat.value, 10),
          lit: parseInt(elements.lit.value, 10),
        };
      }

      function setRootPalette(hexes) {
        for (let i = 0; i < CONFIG.palette.maxColors; i++) {
          const key = `${CONFIG.palette.variablePrefix}${i + 1}`;
          if (i < hexes.length && hexes[i]) {
            elements.root.style.setProperty(key, hexes[i]);
          } else {
            elements.root.style.removeProperty(key);
          }
        }
      }

      function generateCssTokens(hexes) {
        const lines = [':root {'];
        hexes.forEach((hex, i) => {
          lines.push(`  ${CONFIG.palette.variablePrefix}${i + 1}: ${hex};`);
        });
        lines.push('}');
        return lines.join('\n');
      }

      function generateJsonExport(settings, hexes) {
        return JSON.stringify({
          scheme: settings.type,
          base: settings.baseHex,
          colors: hexes,
        }, null, 2);
      }

      function generate() {
        updateOutputs();
        const settings = getFormSettings();
        // Sync color inputs
        elements.baseColor.value = settings.baseHex;
        elements.baseHex.value = settings.baseHex;
        // Generate palette
        const palette = PaletteGenerator.generate(settings);
        const hexes = palette.map(c => c.hex);
        // Update UI
        setRootPalette(hexes);
        PaletteRenderer.render(palette);
        // Update export
        const css = generateCssTokens(hexes);
        const json = generateJsonExport(settings, hexes);
        elements.exportCode.value = `${css}\n\n/* JSON */\n${json}`;
        // Save state
        StateManager.set({
          baseHex: settings.baseHex,
          scheme: settings.type,
          count: settings.count,
          drift: settings.drift,
          saturation: settings.sat,
          lightness: settings.lit,
          palette: hexes,
        });
        return {
          palette,
          css,
          json,
          hexes
        };
      }

      function randomize() {
        const hex = ColorService.randomHex();
        elements.baseColor.value = hex;
        elements.baseHex.value = hex;
        generate();
        Toast.show('Randomized!');
      }
      async function copyCss() {
        const {
          css
        } = generate();
        const success = await ClipboardService.copy(css);
        Toast.show(success ? 'CSS copied!' : 'Copy failed');
      }
      async function copyJson() {
        const {
          json
        } = generate();
        const success = await ClipboardService.copy(json);
        Toast.show(success ? 'JSON copied!' : 'Copy failed');
      }

      function setViewMode(mode) {
        PaletteRenderer.setViewMode(mode);
        StateManager.set({
          viewMode: mode
        });
      }

      function restoreState() {
        const state = StateManager.init();
        elements.baseColor.value = state.baseHex;
        elements.baseHex.value = state.baseHex;
        elements.scheme.value = state.scheme;
        elements.count.value = state.count;
        elements.drift.value = state.drift;
        elements.sat.value = state.saturation;
        elements.lit.value = state.lightness;
        PaletteRenderer.setViewMode(state.viewMode);
      }

      function init() {
        // Initialize toast
        Toast.init(elements.toast);
        // Restore previous state
        restoreState();
        // Initial generation
        generate();
        // Debounced generate for sliders
        const debouncedGenerate = debounce(generate, CONFIG.debounce.inputDelay);
        // Form events
        elements.form.addEventListener('submit', (e) => {
          e.preventDefault();
          generate();
          Toast.show('Generated!');
        });
        // Color picker sync
        elements.baseColor.addEventListener('input', (e) => {
          elements.baseHex.value = e.target.value.toUpperCase();
          debouncedGenerate();
        });
        elements.baseHex.addEventListener('change', () => {
          const normalized = sanitizeHex(elements.baseHex.value);
          if (normalized && normalized !== '#000000') {
            elements.baseHex.value = normalized;
            elements.baseColor.value = normalized;
            elements.baseHex.removeAttribute('aria-invalid');
            generate();
          } else {
            elements.baseHex.setAttribute('aria-invalid', 'true');
            Toast.show('Invalid hex format');
          }
        });
        // Slider events
        ['scheme', 'count', 'drift', 'sat', 'lit'].forEach(id => {
          elements[id].addEventListener('input', debouncedGenerate);
        });
        // Button events
        elements.randomBtn.addEventListener('click', randomize);
        elements.copyCssBtn.addEventListener('click', copyCss);
        elements.copyJsonBtn.addEventListener('click', copyJson);
        // View mode toggle
        elements.viewGrid.addEventListener('click', () => setViewMode('grid'));
        elements.viewList.addEventListener('click', () => setViewMode('list'));
        // Keyboard shortcuts
        document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
          // Ignore if focus is in an input
          if (e.target.matches('input, textarea, select')) return;
          if (e.altKey) {
            switch (e.key.toLowerCase()) {
              case 'r':
                e.preventDefault();
                randomize();
                break;
              case 'g':
                e.preventDefault();
                generate();
                Toast.show('Generated!');
                break;
              case 'c':
                e.preventDefault();
                copyCss();
                break;
            }
          }
        });
        console.log('Color Palette Generator initialized');
      }
      return {
        init,
        generate,
        randomize
      };
    })();
    // Initialize on DOM ready
    if (document.readyState === 'loading') {
      document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', App.init);
    } else {
      App.init();
    }
  </script>
</body>

</html>

import React, { StrictMode } from "https://esm.sh/react";
import { createRoot } from "https://esm.sh/react-dom/client";
import clsx from "https://esm.sh/clsx";
const color = {
    yellow: "hsl(50, 100%, 70%)",
    green: "hsl(130, 90%, 70%)",
    cyan: "hsl(190, 80%, 70%)",
    blue: "hsl(240, 50%, 50%)",
    purple: "hsl(260, 50%, 55%)",
    lightPurple: "hsl(260, 80%, 75%)",
    pink: "hsl(330, 100%, 75%)"
};
const duration = 1200;
createRoot(document.getElementById("root")).render(React.createElement(StrictMode, null,
    React.createElement(Fireworks, { duration: duration },
        React.createElement(Firework, { x: 336, y: 284 },
            React.createElement(FireworkRocket, { y: 284, delay: -0.675 * duration, exhaustColor: color.purple, exhaustLength: 150 }),

            React.createElement(FireworkRing, { delay: -0.55 * duration, type: "8rays", radius: 60, fillColor: color.yellow, strokeWidth: 20 })),
        React.createElement(Firework, { x: 652, y: 380 },
            React.createElement(FireworkRing, { delay: -0.4 * duration, type: "16rays", radius: 36, fillColor: color.blue, strokeWidth: 13 })))));
function Fireworks({ duration, children }) {
    const viewBoxWidth = 800;
    const viewBoxHeight = 600;
    const viewBox = `0 0 ${viewBoxWidth} ${viewBoxHeight}`;
    const viewBoxWidthPx = `${viewBoxWidth}px`;
    const viewBoxHeightPx = `${viewBoxHeight}px`;
    const rootStyle = {
        "--anim-dur": `${duration}ms`
    };
    return (React.createElement("svg", { "data-testid": "fireworks", className: "fireworks", viewBox: viewBox, width: viewBoxWidthPx, height: viewBoxHeightPx, "aria-label": "Fireworks", style: rootStyle }, children));
}
function Firework({ x, y, children }) {
    const transform = `translate(${x}, ${y})`;
    return (React.createElement("g", { "data-testid": "firework", transform: transform }, children));
}
;
function FireworkRing({ radius, type = "dashed", delay = 0, fillColor = "none", strokeColor, strokeWidth = 1, direction }) {
    const delayStyle = {
        animationDelay: `${delay}ms`
    };
    if (type.includes("dots")) {
        const dots = +type.slice(0, -4);
        const dotArray = [];
        const ringClass = clsx("fireworks__ring", `fireworks__ring--${direction}`);
        for (let d = 1; d <= dots; ++d) {
            const dotId = `dot${d}`;
            const dotRotate = `rotate(${360 / dots * d})`;
            const dotTranslate = `translate(0, ${radius})`;
            const dotTransform = `${dotRotate} ${dotTranslate}`;
            dotArray.push(React.createElement("g", { key: dotId, transform: dotTransform },
                React.createElement("circle", { className: clsx("fireworks__particle", "fireworks__particle--dot"), fill: fillColor, stroke: strokeColor, r: strokeWidth, style: delayStyle })));
        }
        return (React.createElement("g", { "data-testid": "firework-ring", className: ringClass, style: delayStyle }, dotArray));
    }
    if (type.includes("rays")) {
        const isQuick = type.includes("Quick");
        const rays = +type.slice(0, isQuick ? -9 : -4);
        const rayArray = [];
        const rayStrokeWidth = fillColor === "none" ? 2 : 0;
        const rx = strokeWidth / 10;
        const rayClass = clsx("fireworks__particle", isQuick ?
            "fireworks__particle--quick-ray" :
            "fireworks__particle--ray");
        const quickRayClass = clsx("fireworks__particle", isQuick ?
            "fireworks__particle--quick-ray-flip" :
            "fireworks__particle--ray-flip");
        for (let r = 1; r <= rays; ++r) {
            const rayId = `ray${r}`;
            const rayRotate = `rotate(${(360 / rays) * r})`;
            const rayTranslateY = radius - strokeWidth;
            const rayTranslate = `translate(0, ${rayTranslateY})`;
            const rayTransform = `${rayRotate} ${rayTranslate}`;
            const rayFlipTranslate = `translate(0, ${-strokeWidth * 2})`;
            const rayFlipTransform = `rotate(180) ${rayFlipTranslate}`;
            rayArray.push(React.createElement("g", { key: rayId, transform: rayTransform },
                React.createElement("ellipse", { className: rayClass, fill: fillColor, stroke: strokeColor, strokeWidth: rayStrokeWidth, cy: strokeWidth, rx: rx, ry: strokeWidth, style: delayStyle }),
                React.createElement("g", { transform: rayFlipTransform },
                    React.createElement("ellipse", { className: quickRayClass, fill: fillColor, stroke: strokeColor, strokeWidth: rayStrokeWidth, cy: strokeWidth, rx: rx, ry: strokeWidth, style: delayStyle }))));
        }
        return (React.createElement("g", { "data-testid": "firework-ring" }, rayArray));
    }
    // dashed by default
    const directionClass = clsx("fireworks__ring", `fireworks__ring--${direction}`);
    const dashedClass = clsx("fireworks__particle", "fireworks__particle--dashed");
    return (React.createElement("g", { "data-testid": "firework-ring", className: directionClass, style: delayStyle },
        React.createElement("circle", { className: dashedClass, fill: fillColor, pathLength: "48", stroke: strokeColor, strokeDasharray: "1 2", strokeWidth: radius, r: radius / 2, style: delayStyle })));
}
function FireworkRocket({ y, delay = 0, exhaustColor = "#000", exhaustLength = 1 }) {
    const trajectoryStart = 600;
    const delayStyle = {
        animationDelay: `${delay}ms`
    };
    const trajectoryWidth = 4;
    const trajectory = (trajectoryStart - y) - trajectoryWidth;
    const unfilled = trajectory - exhaustLength;
    const rocketStrokeDash = `${exhaustLength} ${unfilled + trajectory}`;
    return (React.createElement("path", { "data-testid": "firework-rocket", className: "fireworks__rocket", fill: "none", stroke: exhaustColor, strokeLinecap: "round", strokeWidth: trajectoryWidth, d: Utils.pathWave(0, 0, 0, trajectory, 20, 15), strokeDasharray: rocketStrokeDash, strokeDashoffset: -trajectory, style: delayStyle }));
}
class Utils {
    static random(min = 0, max = 1) {
        const value = crypto.getRandomValues(new Uint32Array(1))[0] / 2 ** 32;
        return min + (value * (max - min));
    }
    static pathWave(x1, y1, x2, y2, segments, amplitude) {
        const points = [];
        const maxFactor = 0.5;
        for (let i = 0; i <= segments; i++) {
            const t = i / segments;
            // linear interpolation to find point on the straight line
            let x = x1 + (x2 - x1) * t;
            let y = y1 + (y2 - y1) * t;
            // add random offset perpendicular to the line (except for start/end)
            if (i > 0 && i < segments) {
                // calculate the angle of the line to offset perpendicularly
                const angle = Math.atan2(y2 - y1, x2 - x1);
                const offset = this.random(-maxFactor, maxFactor) * amplitude;
                x += Math.cos(angle + Math.PI / 2) * offset;
                y += Math.sin(angle + Math.PI / 2) * offset;
            }
            points.push({ x, y });
        }
        // M = move to start, Q = control point + end point
        let d = `M ${points[0].x},${points[0].y}`;
        for (let i = 1; i < points.length; i++) {
            // use the point itself as the curve anchor
            // for a smoother look, you can calculate midpoints between segments
            const prev = points[i - 1];
            const curr = points[i];
            const midX = (prev.x + curr.x) / 2;
            const midY = (prev.y + curr.y) / 2;
            d += ` Q ${prev.x},${prev.y} ${midX},${midY}`;
        }
        d += ` L ${x2},${y2}`;
        return d;
    }
}

function styleInject(css, ref) {
  if ( ref === void 0 ) ref = {};
  var insertAt = ref.insertAt;

  if (!css || typeof document === 'undefined') { return; }

  var head = document.head || document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0];
  var style = document.createElement('style');
  style.type = 'text/css';

  if (insertAt === 'top') {
    if (head.firstChild) {
      head.insertBefore(style, head.firstChild);
    } else {
      head.appendChild(style);
    }
  } else {
    head.appendChild(style);
  }

  if (style.styleSheet) {
    style.styleSheet.cssText = css;
  } else {
    style.appendChild(document.createTextNode(css));
  }
}

var css_248z = "\n.bg-animate {\n\tbackground: linear-gradient(-45deg, #334155, #1e293b);\n\tbackground-size: 200% 200%;\n\tanimation: gradient 1s ease infinite;\n}\n@keyframes gradient {\n0% {\n\t\tbackground-position: 0% 50%;\n}\n50% {\n\t\tbackground-position: 100% 50%;\n}\n100% {\n\t\tbackground-position: 0% 50%;\n}\n}\n";

── TSX (React) ─────────────────────────────────────────────
import RangeSlider from "https://esm.sh/svelte-range-slider-pips@4.0.8";

let value = 0;
const min = -50;
const max = 50;

const contrastSlider = new RangeSlider({
    target: document.getElementById("contrast-slider"),
    props: {
        value,
        vertical: true,
        pips: true,
        step: 5,
        min,
        max,
        float: false
    }
});

const $button = document.querySelector('button[popovertarget]');
const $value = document.querySelector('.contrast-buttons > span')
const $up = document.querySelector('#up')
const $down = document.querySelector('#down')

const updateValue = v => {
    value = v;
    setValue(v);
    contrastSlider.$set({ values: [ v ]});
}
const setValue = (v) => {
    $value.innerText = v;
    const html = document.body.parentElement;
    html.style.filter = `contrast(${v/300 + 1})`
}
contrastSlider.$on('change', (e) => {
    value = e.detail.value;
    setValue( value );
});
const increase = () => {
    value = Math.min(value + 5, max);
    updateValue(value);
};
const decrease = () => {
    value = Math.max(value - 5, min);
    updateValue(value);
};


let intervalId;
const startFiring = (cb) => { intervalId = setInterval(cb, 50); };
const stopFiring = () => { clearInterval(intervalId); };

$up.addEventListener( 'pointerdown', () => {
    stopFiring()
    startFiring(increase);
});
$up.addEventListener( 'pointerup', () => {
    stopFiring();
});
$up.addEventListener( 'pointerleave', () => {
    stopFiring();
});
$down.addEventListener( 'pointerdown', () => {
    stopFiring()
    startFiring(decrease);
});
$down.addEventListener( 'pointerup', () => {
    stopFiring();
});
$down.addEventListener( 'pointerleave', () => {
    stopFiring();
});


// auto show for preview
const $popover = document.querySelector('#contrast-popover');
setTimeout(() => {
    $popover.showPopover();
}, 1500);

$popover.addEventListener("toggle", (event) => {
    if ( event.newState === 'closed' ) {
        $button.focus();
    } else {
        const focusEvent = new FocusEvent('focus', {
            bubbles: true, // Set to true if you want the event to bubble up the DOM tree
            cancelable: false // Focus events are generally not cancelable
        });
        contrastSlider.$$.root.querySelector('.rangeHandle').focus(); 
    }
})

[161]  Border Image Fill Gradient Overlay
URL  : https://freefrontend.com/code/border-image-fill-gradient-overlay-2026-01-22/
By   : anon
Tags : HTML36, CSS282, JavaScript218, Bootstrap65, Tailwind CSS78, css image effects, css gradient, css linear gradient

── HTML ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
<h1>Gradient overlay with <code>border-image</code></h1>

<div class="wrapper">
  <h2>Simplicty in the Kitchen</h2>
</div>
<label>
  <input type="checkbox" id="toggle-gradient" checked>toggle gradient
</label>
<code class="demo">
  border-image: fill 0 linear-gradient(transparent 50%, #000);
</code>


── CSS ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
@import url(https://fonts.bunny.net/css?family=jura:300,500);
@layer base, demo;

@layer demo {
  .wrapper {
		 /* this is the magic border-image gradient trick to create an overlay*/
		border-image: fill 0 linear-gradient(transparent 50%, black); /* you can change the color accordinly */
		
		
		/* general sytling for the demo */
    display: grid;
    place-items: end center;
    padding:1rem;
    width: min(100%,500px);
    aspect-ratio:4/6;
    background-image: url(https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1756906838843-c80118e2416e?crop=entropy&cs=srgb&fm=jpg&ixid=M3wzMjM4NDZ8MHwxfHJhbmRvbXx8fHx8fHx8fDE3NTc1ODQ3NDZ8&ixlib=rb-4.1.0&q=85&w=400);
    background-size: cover;
    & > h2{
			font-size: 1.1rem;
    }
  }
	
	
	/* checkbox toggle code - not relevant for the actual effect */
  body:not(:has(input#toggle-gradient:checked)) .wrapper{
    /* remove border image just for the toggle - not really relevant */
		border-image: none;
  }
  label{
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: .25em;
  }
  code.demo{
    font-size: .7rem;
    padding: 1em;
    border:1px solid var(--clr-lines);
    opacity:0;
    transition: opacity 150ms ease-in-out;
  }
   body:has(input#toggle-gradient:checked) code.demo{
    opacity: 1;
  }
}
  
  
  /* general styling not relevant for this demo */
@layer base {
	* {
		box-sizing: border-box;
	}
	:root {
		color-scheme: light dark;
		--bg-dark: rgb(16, 24, 40);
		--bg-light: rgb(248, 244, 238);
		--txt-light: rgb(10, 10, 10);
		--txt-dark: rgb(245, 245, 245););
		--line-light: rgba(0 0 0 / .25);
		--line-dark: rgba(255 255 255 / .25);
    
    --clr-bg: light-dark(var(--bg-light), var(--bg-dark));
    --clr-txt: light-dark(var(--txt-light), var(--txt-dark));
    --clr-lines: light-dark(var(--line-light), var(--line-dark));
	}
 
	body {
		background-color: var(--clr-bg);
		color: var(--clr-txt);
		min-height: 100svh;
		margin: 0;
		padding: 2rem;
		font-family: "Jura", sans-serif;
		font-size: 1rem;
		line-height: 1.5;
    display: grid;
    place-content: center;
    gap: 2rem;
		& > * {
			/*outline: 1px dashed red;*/
		}
	}
	h1 {
		margin: 0;
		font-size: 1.2rem;
	}

	.msg-supports {
		font-size: 0.8rem;
		/*
    @supports (animation-timeline: scroll()) {
			display: none;
		}
    @supports (order:sibling-index()) {
			display: none;
		}
    @supports (x: attr(x type(*))) {
			display: none;
		}
    */
	}

── HTML ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
<nav>
  <ul>
    <li><a href="#">Home</a></li>
    <li><a href="#">About</a></li>
    <li><a href="#">Blog</a></li>
    <li><a href="#">Contact</a></li>
  </ul>
</nav>

── CSS ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
html {
  interpolate-size: allow-keywords;
}

body {
  background-image: url("https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1751220170218-e57d53bd4aa8?crop=entropy&cs=tinysrgb&fit=max&fm=jpg&ixid=M3wzMjM4NDZ8MHwxfHJhbmRvbXx8fHx8fHx8fDE3NTE1NjQ0MjR8&ixlib=rb-4.1.0&q=80&w=1800");
  background-attachment: fixed;
}

nav {
  width: fit-content;
  margin: 3rem auto;

  padding: 8px;
  /*   background: black; */
  border-radius: 8px;

  @supports (corner-shape: squircle) {
    border-radius: 24px;
    border-shape: squircle;
  }

  ul:has(:not(:hover)) {
    anchor-name: --test;
  }

  &::before {
    z-index: -2;
    background-attachment: fixed;
    background-image: url("https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1751220170218-e57d53bd4aa8?crop=entropy&cs=tinysrgb&fit=max&fm=jpg&ixid=M3wzMjM4NDZ8MHwxfHJhbmRvbXx8fHx8fHx8fDE3NTE1NjQ0MjR8&ixlib=rb-4.1.0&q=80&w=1800");
  }

  &::after {
    backdrop-filter: blur(2px);
    background-color: hsl(200 100% 100% / 0.1);
    z-index: -1;
  }

  & > ul {
    position: relative;

    &::after {
      content: "";
      position: absolute;
      z-index: -3;
      inset: -8px;
      border-radius: 8px;

      @supports (corner-shape: squircle) {
        border-radius: 24px;
        border-shape: squircle;
      }
      background: hsl(0 0% 0% / 0.8);
      backdrop-filter: blur(2px);
    }
  }

  &::before,
  &::after {
    content: "";
    border-radius: 8px;

    position-anchor: --test;
    position: absolute;
    top: calc(anchor(bottom) - 4px);
    left: calc(anchor(left) + 1rem);
    right: calc(anchor(right) + 1rem);
    bottom: anchor(bottom);

    transition: 500ms;
    transition-timing-function: linear(
      0,
      0.008 1.1%,
      0.031 2.2%,
      0.129 4.8%,
      0.257 7.2%,
      0.671 14.2%,
      0.789 16.5%,
      0.881 18.6%,
      0.957 20.7%,
      1.019 22.9%,
      1.063 25.1%,
      1.094 27.4%,
      1.114 30.7%,
      1.112 34.5%,
      1.018 49.9%,
      0.99 59.1%,
      1
    );
  }

  &:has(a:hover)::before,
  &:has(a:hover)::after {
    @supports (corner-shape: squircle) {
      corner-shape: squircle;
      border-radius: 50%;
    }
    top: anchor(top);
    left: anchor(left);
    right: anchor(right);
  }

  &:has(li:first-of-type a:hover)::before,
  &:has(li:first-of-type a:hover)::after {
    @supports (corner-shape: squircle) {
      border-radius: 32px 50% 50% 32px;
    }
  }

  &:has(li:last-of-type a:hover)::before,
  &:has(li:last-of-type a:hover)::after {
    @supports (corner-shape: squircle) {
      border-radius: 50% 32px 32px 50%;
    }
  }

  > ul {
    padding: 0;
    margin: 0;
    list-style: none;
    display: flex;
  }

  a {
    display: block;
    padding: 1rem;
    text-decoration: none;
    color: white;

    &:hover {
      position: relative;
      display: block;
      anchor-name: --test;
    }
  }
}

  color-scheme: dark;
}

  font-family: system-ui;
  font-size: 2rem;
}

	block-size: auto;

	block-size: calc-size(auto, size);
}

summary::marker {
	content: '»';
	content: none;
}

	content: '»';

        <path d="M9 19c-4.3 1.4 -4.3 -2.5 -6 -3m12 5v-3.5c0 -1 .1 -1.4 -.5 -2c2.8 -.3 5.5 -1.4 5.5 -6a4.6 4.6 0 0 0 -1.3 -3.2a4.2 4.2 0 0 0 -.1 -3.2s-1.1 -.3 -3.5 1.3a12.3 12.3 0 0 0 -6.2 0c-2.4 -1.6 -3.5 -1.3 -3.5 -1.3a4.2 4.2 0 0 0 -.1 3.2a4.6 4.6 0 0 0 -1.3 3.2c0 4.6 2.7 5.7 5.5 6c-.6 .6 -.6 1.2 -.5 2v3.5"></path>
    </svg>
</a>

── CSS ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
@property --skele-pos {
    syntax: "<number>";
    inherits: true;
    initial-value: 0;
}

@property --100vw {
  syntax: "<length>";
  initial-value: 0px;
  inherits: false;
}

:root {
    
    /* global skeleton vars */
    
    /* ↓ style */
    
    --skele-color-light: hsl( 228 15% 86% / 100% );
    --skele-color-dark: hsl( 228 15% 16% / 100% );
    --skele-shine-light: hsl( 228 25% 95% / 80% );
    --skele-shine-dark: hsl( 228 18% 22% / 80% ) ;
    --skele-radius: 0.5rem;
    
    /* ↓ effect */
    
    /* time to travel a given distance */
    --skele-distance: 400;  /* travel this many PIXELS */
    --skele-time: 1;        /* over this many SECONDS */
    --skele-scaler: 0.7;    /* scale the speed up as the screen size increases (0-1), 0.7 feels good to me. */
    
    /* gradient */
    --skele-size: clamp(100px, 50vw, 500px); /* size of the gradient that moves */
    --skele-leading-edge-blur: clamp(10px, 5vw, 50px); /* set to 0px for a sharp edge */
    --skele-angle: 96deg; /* gradient's angle */
    
    /* animation */
    --skele-ease: cubic-bezier(0.45, 0.3, 0.7, 0.55); 
    
    /* ↓ stuff to calc, don't edit */
    
    --skele-pos: 0; /* the value we will animate to make the gradient move */
    /* interesting hack to get viewport as an Integer; 
        https://dev.to/janeori/css-type-casting-to-numeric-tanatan2-scalars-582j */
    --100vw: 100vw;
    --int-width: calc(10000 * tan(atan2(var(--100vw), 10000px)));
    /* scale the animation speed so it gets faster as the screen gets larger */
    --scaled-time: calc((1 - (var(--int-width) / 400) * var(--skele-scaler) / 5));
    /* get the animation time as a fraction of our desired distance/time */
    --anim-time: calc( ((var(--int-width) / var( --skele-distance )) * (var(--skele-time) * 1.33)) * var(--scaled-time)); 
    /* we have the animation waiting for 1/3 of the time before starting each loop, 
        so we multiple total time by 1.33 to account for it */

}

@keyframes skeleton {
    0% { --skele-pos: 0; }
    66%, 100% { --skele-pos: 1; }
    /* 66% means we wait for ~1/3 of the time after playing the animation */
}

:root {
    animation: skeleton calc( 1000ms * var(--anim-time)) var(--skele-ease) infinite;
}

.skeleton {
    
    --skele-color: light-dark( 
        var(--skele-color-light), 
        var(--skele-color-dark)
    );
    --skele-shine-color: light-dark( 
        var(--skele-shine-light),
        var(--skele-shine-dark)
    );
    
    color: transparent;
    background-color: var(--skele-color);
    border-radius: var(--skele-radius);
    
    --anim-pos: calc( var( --skele-pos ) * ( 100vw + var( --skele-size ) * 2 ) - var( --skele-size ) );
    
    /* eased gradient, 
        so it looks smoother than a simple 'to right, transparent, white' */
    
    background-image:
      linear-gradient(
        var(--skele-angle, 90deg),
        hsl( from var( --skele-shine-color ) h s l / 0 ) calc( var( --anim-pos ) ),
        hsl( from var( --skele-shine-color ) h s l / 1 ) calc( var( --anim-pos ) + var( --skele-size ) ),
        hsl( from var( --skele-shine-color ) h s l / 0 ) calc( var( --anim-pos ) + var( --skele-size ) + var( --skele-leading-edge-blur ) )
      );
    
    background-attachment: fixed;
    
}

.skeleton.multi-line {
    display: inline;
    box-decoration-break: clone;
    line-height: 1.4;
}

.skeleton.circle {
    aspect-ratio: 1;
    border-radius: 100vw;
}

.skeleton.square {
    aspect-ratio: 1;
}

.skeleton.rectangle {
    aspect-ratio: 1.618;
}















/** demo setup, not strictly part of the skeleton css **/

:root {
    
    color-scheme: light dark;
    
    --bg-light: hsl(220, 16%, 94%);
    --bg-light2: hsl(212, 50%, 92%);
    --bg-dark:  hsl(222, 15%, 22%);
    --bg-dark2: hsl(222, 25%, 20%);
    --fg-light: hsl(212 22% 26%);
    --fg-dark: hsl(222, 39%, 95%);
    
    --bg: light-dark( var(--bg-light), var(--bg-dark) );
    --bg2: light-dark( var(--bg-light2) , var(--bg-dark2) );
    --fg: light-dark( var(--fg-light), var(--fg-dark) ) ;
    --link: light-dark( hsl(222, 95%, 60%), hsl(222, 95%, 70%) );
    --linkh: light-dark( hsl(150, 90%, 50%), hsl(150, 95%, 70%) );    
    --input-bg-light: hsl(from var(--bg-light) h 15% 100%);
    --input-bg-dark: hsl(from var(--bg-dark) h 15% 10%);
    --input-border-light: hsl(from var(--bg-light) h 15% 85%);
    --input-border-dark: hsl(from var(--bg-light) h 15% 35%);
    --labels-light: hsl(from var(--fg-light) h 20% 55%);
    --labels-dark: hsl(from var(--fg-dark) h 20% 55%);
    
    --labels: light-dark( var(--labels-light), var(--labels-dark) );  /* form labels */
    --b: light-dark( var(--input-bg-light), var(--input-bg-dark) ); /* form element backgrounds */
    --bor: light-dark( var(--input-border-light), var(--input-border-dark) ); /* form element shadows */
    
}

$f: "Mona Sans", system-ui, sans-serif;
@mixin sdo($s, $t, $d) {
	stroke-dasharray: $s;
	stroke-dashoffset: $s;
	will-change: stroke-dashoffset;
	animation: sdo $t ease-out $d both;
}

*, *:before, *:after { box-sizing: border-box; }
* { -webkit-tap-highlight-color: rgba(0,0,0,0); }
*:focus { outline: none!important; }
::selection { background: none; }
a { cursor: pointer; }

			circle {
				&:nth-child(2) {
					@include sdo(43.982, 400ms, 950ms);
					transform: scale(1);
				}
				&:nth-child(3) {
					animation-delay: 750ms;
				}
				&:nth-child(4) {
					animation-delay: 850ms;
				}
			}
		}
		button {
			circle {
				opacity: 0;
				will-change: opacity;
				&:nth-child(1) {
					animation: ellipsis-1 900ms ease-out infinite forwards;
				}
				&:nth-child(2) {
					animation: ellipsis-2 900ms ease-out infinite forwards;
				}
				&:nth-child(3) {
					animation: ellipsis-3 900ms ease-out infinite forwards;
				}
			}
		}
	}
	&.error {
		opacity: 0;
		animation: jitter 225ms ease-in-out 2 both 750ms;
		.icon {
			path {
				@include sdo(26.661, 250ms, 1200ms);
			}
			circle {
				// transform-origin: 50% 50%;
				&:nth-child(3) {
					animation-delay: 1000ms;
				}
				&:nth-child(4) {
					animation-delay: 1100ms;
				}
			}
		}
		button {
			transform-origin: center center;
			transform: rotate(90deg);
			will-change: transform;
			animation: tsfm 570ms ease-out 1000ms both;
			polyline {
				@include sdo(18.1, 200ms, 1300ms);
			}
			path {
				@include sdo(66.376, 650ms, 1400ms);
			}
			span {
				opacity: 0;
				visibility: hidden;
				transform: translateY(100%);
				animation: tsfm-op 500ms cubic-bezier(0,.75,.25,1) 1700ms both;
			}
		}
	}
}

const chars = "abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyzABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ0123456789";

const randomChar = () => chars[Math.floor(Math.random() * (chars.length - 1))],
      randomString = length => Array.from(Array(length)).map(randomChar).join("");

const card = document.querySelector(".card"),
      letters = card.querySelector(".card-letters");

const handleOnMove = e => {
  const rect = card.getBoundingClientRect(),
        x = e.clientX - rect.left,
        y = e.clientY - rect.top;

  letters.style.setProperty("--x", `${x}px`);
  letters.style.setProperty("--y", `${y}px`);

  letters.innerText = randomString(1500);    
}

card.onmousemove = e => handleOnMove(e);

card.ontouchmove = e => handleOnMove(e.touches[0]);

[169]  Interactive 3D Falling Leaves Shader

By   : anon
Tags : HTML36, CSS282, JavaScript218, Bootstrap65, Tailwind CSS78, js particles, js hover effects

── HTML ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
<div id="previewHack"></div>
<script async src="https://ga.jspm.io/npm:es-module-shims@1.6.3/dist/es-module-shims.js" crossorigin="anonymous"></script>
<script type="importmap">
  {
    "imports": {      
      "three": "https://unpkg.com/three@0.154.0/build/three.module.js",
      "three/addons/": "https://unpkg.com/three@0.154.0/examples/jsm/"
    }
  }
</script>
<script async src="https://ga.jspm.io/npm:es-module-shims@1.6.3/dist/es-module-shims.js" crossorigin="anonymous"></script>
<script type="importmap">
  {
    "imports": {      
      "three": "https://unpkg.com/three@0.154.0/build/three.module.js",
      "three/addons/": "https://unpkg.com/three@0.154.0/examples/jsm/"
    }

  position: absolute;
  height: 100vh; 
  width: 100vh;
  top: 50%;
  left: 50%;

── TSX (React) ─────────────────────────────────────────────
import * as THREE from "three";
import { GLTFLoader } from "three/addons/loaders/GLTFLoader.js";
import { OrbitControls } from "three/addons/controls/OrbitControls.js";

const leavesVS = /*glsl*/`
    uniform sampler2D uNoiseMap;
    uniform vec3 uBoxMin, uBoxSize, uRaycast;
    uniform float uTime;
    varying vec3 vObjectPos, vNormal, vWorldNormal; 
    varying float vCloseToGround;
    
    vec4 getTriplanar(sampler2D tex){
        vec4 xPixel = texture(tex, (vObjectPos.xy + uTime) / 3.);
        vec4 yPixel = texture(tex, (vObjectPos.yz + uTime) / 3.);
        vec4 zPixel = texture(tex, (vObjectPos.zx + uTime) / 3.);
        vec4 combined = (xPixel + yPixel + zPixel) / 6.0;
        combined.xyz = combined.xyz * vObjectPos; 
        return combined;
    }
    
    void main(){
        mat4 mouseDisplace = mat4(1.);
        vec3 vWorldPos = vec3(modelMatrix * instanceMatrix * mouseDisplace * vec4(position, 1.));
        vCloseToGround = clamp(vWorldPos.y, 0., 1.);
        float offset = clamp(0.8 - distance(uRaycast, instanceMatrix[3].xyz), 0., 999.); 
        offset = (pow(offset, 0.8) / 2.0) * vCloseToGround;
        mouseDisplace[3].xyz = vec3(offset);
        vNormal = normalMatrix * mat3(instanceMatrix) * mat3(mouseDisplace) * normalize(normal); 
        vWorldNormal = vec3(modelMatrix * instanceMatrix * mouseDisplace * vec4(normal, 0.));
        vObjectPos = ((vWorldPos - uBoxMin) * 2.) / uBoxSize - vec3(1.0); 
        vec4 noiseOffset = getTriplanar(uNoiseMap) * vCloseToGround; 
        vec4 newPos = instanceMatrix * mouseDisplace * vec4(position, 1.); 
        newPos.xyz = newPos.xyz + noiseOffset.xyz;
        gl_Position =  projectionMatrix * modelViewMatrix * newPos;
    }
`
const leavesFS = /*glsl*/`
    #include <common> 
    #include <lights_pars_begin>
    uniform vec3 uColorA, uColorB, uColorC;
    uniform float uTime;
    varying vec3 vObjectPos, vNormal, vWorldNormal; 
    varying float vCloseToGround;
    
    vec3 mix3 (vec3 v1, vec3 v2, vec3 v3, float fa){
        vec3 m; 
        fa > 0.7 ? m = mix(v2, v3, (fa - .5) * 2.) : m = mix(v1, v2, fa * 2.);
        return m;
    }

    float getPosColors(){
        float p = 0.;
        p = smoothstep(0.2, 0.8, distance(vec3(0.), vObjectPos));
        p = p * (-(vWorldNormal.g / 2.) + 0.5) * (- vObjectPos.y / 9. + 0.5); 
        return p;
    }
    float getDiffuse(){
        float intensity;
        for (int i = 0; i < directionalLights.length(); i++){
            intensity = dot(directionalLights[i].direction, vNormal);
            intensity = smoothstep(0.55, 1., intensity) * 0.2 
                        + pow(smoothstep(0.55, 1., intensity), 0.5);
        }
        return intensity;
    }

    void main(){
        float gradMap = (getPosColors() + getDiffuse()) * vCloseToGround / 2. ;
        vec4 c = vec4(mix3(uColorA, uColorB, uColorC, gradMap), 1.0);
        gl_FragColor = vec4(pow(c.xyz,vec3(0.454545)), c.w);
				//gl_FragColor = vec4(c.xyz, c.w);
    }
`

// GENERAL DEFINITIONS
const scene = new THREE.Scene();
const loader = new GLTFLoader();
const camera = new THREE.PerspectiveCamera(35, window.innerWidth/window.innerHeight, 0.001, 1000);
const renderer = new THREE.WebGLRenderer({alpha: true});
const controls = new OrbitControls(camera, renderer.domElement);
const dummy = new THREE.Object3D();
const matrix = new THREE.Matrix4();
const pointer = new THREE.Vector2(); 
const raycaster = new THREE.Raycaster();
const dlight01 = new THREE.DirectionalLight(0xcccccc, 1.8);
const tree = {group: new THREE.Group()};
const noiseMap = new THREE.TextureLoader().load('https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ceramicSoda/treeshader/main/assets/noise.png');
const poleTexture = new THREE.TextureLoader().load('https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ceramicSoda/treeshader/main/assets/texture.jpg');
poleTexture.rotation = 100 * 0.01745329252; // WTF???
const rayPlane = new THREE.Mesh(new THREE.PlaneGeometry(100,100,1,1), undefined);
// MATERIALS
const leavesMat = new THREE.ShaderMaterial({
  lights: true,
  side: THREE.DoubleSide,
  uniforms: {
    ...THREE.UniformsLib.lights,
    uTime: {value: 0.},
    uColorA: {value: new THREE.Color(0xb45252)},
    uColorB: {value: new THREE.Color(0xd3a068)},
    uColorC: {value: new THREE.Color(0xede19e)},
    uBoxMin: {value: new THREE.Vector3(0,0,0)},
    uBoxSize: {value: new THREE.Vector3(10,10,10)},
    uRaycast: {value: new THREE.Vector3(0,0,0)},
    uNoiseMap: {value: noiseMap},
  },
  vertexShader: leavesVS,
  fragmentShader: leavesFS,
})
// GLTF LOADING 
 loader.loadAsync("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ceramicSoda/treeshader/main/assets/tree.glb")
  .then(obj => {
	document.getElementById("previewHack").style.display = "none";
  tree.pole = obj.scene.getObjectByName("Pole");
  tree.pole.material = new THREE.MeshToonMaterial({map: tree.pole.material.map});
  // Each vertex of crown mesh will be a leaf
  // Crown mesh won't be visible in scene
  tree.crown = obj.scene.getObjectByName("Leaves");
  // For object space shader
  tree.bbox = new THREE.Box3().setFromObject(tree.crown);
  leavesMat.uniforms.uBoxMin.value.copy(tree.bbox.min); 
  leavesMat.uniforms.uBoxSize.value.copy(tree.bbox.getSize(new THREE.Vector3())); 
  tree.leavesCount = tree.crown.geometry.attributes.position.count;
  tree.whenDied = new Array(tree.leavesCount);
  tree.deadID = []; 
  tree.leafGeometry = obj.scene.getObjectByName("Leaf").geometry; 
  tree.leaves = new THREE.InstancedMesh(tree.leafGeometry, leavesMat, tree.leavesCount); 
  for (let i = 0; i < tree.leavesCount; i++) { 
    dummy.position.x = tree.crown.geometry.attributes.position.array[i*3];
    dummy.position.y = tree.crown.geometry.attributes.position.array[i*3+1];
    dummy.position.z = tree.crown.geometry.attributes.position.array[i*3+2];
    dummy.lookAt(dummy.position.x + tree.crown.geometry.attributes.normal.array[i*3],
                 dummy.position.y + tree.crown.geometry.attributes.normal.array[i*3+1],
                 dummy.position.z + tree.crown.geometry.attributes.normal.array[i*3+2]);
    dummy.scale.x = (Math.random() * 0.2 + 0.8);
    dummy.scale.y = (Math.random() * 0.2 + 0.8);
    dummy.scale.z = (Math.random() * 0.2 + 0.8);
    dummy.updateMatrix();
    tree.leaves.setMatrixAt(i, dummy.matrix);
  }
  tree.group.add(tree.pole, tree.leaves);
  for (let i = 0; i < 24; i++)
    tree.deadID.push(Math.floor(Math.random() * tree.leavesCount)); 
})
// INIT
document.body.appendChild(renderer.domElement); 
renderer.setSize(window.innerWidth, window.innerHeight);
dlight01.position.set(3,6,-3);
dlight01.lookAt(0,2.4,0);
rayPlane.visible = false;
camera.position.set(-7,1,-12);
controls.target = new THREE.Vector3(0,2.4,0);
controls.maxPolarAngle = Math.PI * 0.5; 
controls.enableDamping = true;
controls.autoRotate = true;
controls.enablePan = false;
controls.touches = {TWO: THREE.TOUCH.ROTATE,};
scene.add(dlight01, tree.group, rayPlane);
noiseMap.wrapS = THREE.RepeatWrapping;
noiseMap.wrapT = THREE.RepeatWrapping;
// MAIN LOOP
animate()
function animate () {
	requestAnimationFrame(animate);
  leavesMat.uniforms.uTime.value += 0.01; 

  if (tree.deadID){
    tree.deadID = tree.deadID.map(i => {
      tree.leaves.getMatrixAt(i, matrix);
      matrix.decompose(dummy.position, dummy.rotation, dummy.scale);
      if (dummy.position.y > 0) {
        dummy.position.y -= 0.04;
        dummy.position.x += Math.random()/5 - 0.11;
        dummy.position.z += Math.random()/5 - 0.11;
        dummy.rotation.x += 0.2;
        dummy.updateMatrix();
        tree.leaves.setMatrixAt(i, dummy.matrix);
        return(i);
      }
    })
    tree.leaves.instanceMatrix.needsUpdate = true; 
  } 

  controls.update(); 
  renderer.render(scene, camera); 
}
// EVENTS
window.addEventListener("resize", () => {
  camera.aspect = document.body.clientWidth / document.body.clientHeight;
  camera.updateProjectionMatrix();
  renderer.setSize( document.body.clientWidth, document.body.clientHeight );
})
document.addEventListener("mousemove", (e) => pointerMove(e))
// MISC
killRandom();
function killRandom() {
  if (tree.deadID)
    tree.deadID.push(Math.floor(Math.random() * tree.leavesCount)); 
  setTimeout(killRandom, Math.random() * 1500);
}
function pointerMove(e) {
    pointer.set((e.clientX / window.innerWidth) * 2 - 1,
              -(e.clientY / window.innerHeight) * 2 + 1);
  raycaster.setFromCamera(pointer, camera);
  const intersects = raycaster.intersectObjects([tree.leaves, rayPlane]);
  if (intersects[0]){
    // for smooth transition between background and tree
    rayPlane.position.copy(intersects[0].point);
    rayPlane.position.multiplyScalar(0.9);
    rayPlane.lookAt(camera.position);
    leavesMat.uniforms.uRaycast.value = intersects[0].point;
    if (Math.random()*5 > 3)
      tree.deadID.push(intersects[0].instanceId);
  }
}

── TSX (React) ─────────────────────────────────────────────
const DOT_AMOUNT = 40;

const createSVG = (width, height, className, childType, childAttributes) => {
  const svg = document.createElementNS("http://www.w3.org/2000/svg", "svg");

  svg.classList.add(className);

  const child = document.createElementNS(
    "http://www.w3.org/2000/svg",
    childType
  );

  svg.setAttributeNS(
    "http://www.w3.org/2000/svg",
    "viewBox",
    `0 0 ${width} ${height}`
  );

  for (const attr in childAttributes) {
    child.setAttribute(attr, childAttributes[attr]);
  }

  svg.appendChild(child);

  return { svg, child };
};

document.querySelectorAll(".generate-button").forEach((button) => {
  const width = button.offsetWidth;
  const height = button.offsetHeight;

  const style = getComputedStyle(button);

  const { svg, child: circle } = createSVG(width, height, "dots", "circle", {
    cx: "0",
    cy: "0",
    r: "0",
  });

  const strokeGroup = document.createElement("div");
  strokeGroup.classList.add("stroke");

  const { svg: stroke } = createSVG(width, height, "stroke-line", "rect", {
    x: "0",
    y: "0",
    width: "100%",
    height: "100%",
    rx: parseInt(style.borderRadius, 10),
    ry: parseInt(style.borderRadius, 10),
    pathLength: "10",
  });

  button.appendChild(svg);

  strokeGroup.appendChild(stroke);
  strokeGroup.appendChild(stroke.cloneNode(true));

  button.appendChild(strokeGroup);

  const timeline = gsap.timeline({ paused: true });

  for (var i = 0; i < DOT_AMOUNT; i++) {
    var p = circle.cloneNode(true);
    svg.appendChild(p);

    gsap.set(p, {
      attr: {
        cx: gsap.utils.random(width * 0.25, width * 0.75),
        cy: gsap.utils.random(height * 0.5, height * 0.5),
        r: 0,
      },
    });

    var durationRandom = gsap.utils.random(10, 12);

    var tl = gsap.timeline();

    tl.to(
      p,
      {
        duration: durationRandom,
        rotation: i % 2 === 0 ? 200 : -200,
        attr: {
          r: gsap.utils.random(0.75, 1.5),
          cy: -width * gsap.utils.random(1.25, 1.75),
        },
        physics2D: {
          angle: -90,
          gravity: gsap.utils.random(-4, -8),
          velocity: gsap.utils.random(10, 25),
        },
      },
      "-=" + durationRandom / 2
    ).to(
      p,
      {
        duration: durationRandom / 3,
        attr: {
          r: 0,
        },
      },
      "-=" + durationRandom / 4
    );

    timeline.add(tl, i / 3);
  }

  svg.removeChild(circle);

  const finalTimeline = gsap.to(timeline, {
    duration: 10,
    repeat: -1,
    time: timeline.duration(),
    paused: true,
  });

  const stars = gsap.to(button, {
    repeat: -1,
    repeatDelay: 0.75,
    paused: true,
    keyframes: [
      {
        "--generate-button-star-2-scale": ".5",
        "--generate-button-star-2-opacity": ".25",
        "--generate-button-star-3-scale": "1.25",
        "--generate-button-star-3-opacity": "1",
        duration: 0.3,
      },
      {
        "--generate-button-star-1-scale": "1.5",
        "--generate-button-star-1-opacity": ".5",
        "--generate-button-star-2-scale": ".5",
        "--generate-button-star-3-scale": "1",
        "--generate-button-star-3-opacity": ".5",
        duration: 0.3,
      },
      {
        "--generate-button-star-1-scale": "1",
        "--generate-button-star-1-opacity": ".25",
        "--generate-button-star-2-scale": "1.15",
        "--generate-button-star-2-opacity": "1",
        duration: 0.3,
      },
      {
        "--generate-button-star-2-scale": "1",
        duration: 0.35,
      },
    ],
  });

  button.addEventListener("pointerenter", () => {
    gsap.to(button, {
      "--generate-button-dots-opacity": ".5",
      duration: 0.25,
      onStart: () => {
        finalTimeline.restart().play();
        setTimeout(() => stars.restart().play(), 500);
      },
    });
  });

  button.addEventListener("pointerleave", () => {
    gsap.to(button, {
      "--generate-button-dots-opacity": "0",
      "--generate-button-star-1-opacity": ".25",
      "--generate-button-star-1-scale": "1",
      "--generate-button-star-2-opacity": "1",
      "--generate-button-star-2-scale": "1",
      "--generate-button-star-3-opacity": ".5",
      "--generate-button-star-3-scale": "1",
      duration: 0.15,
      onComplete: () => {
        finalTimeline.pause();
        stars.pause();
      },
    });
  });
});


────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

@use 'sass:list';
@use 'sass:map';

// Floating Action Button (FAB) from Google's Material (Design System)
// Design Tokens Spec: https://m3.material.io/foundations/design-tokens/overview
// FAB Spec: https://m3.material.io/components/extended-fab/overview
:root {
  --md-ref-primary40: #3a6a1e;
  --md-ref-primary90: #b9f295;
  --md-ref-secondary80: #bdcbaf;
  --md-ref-secondary90: #d9e7ca;
  --md-ref-neutral99: #fdfdf5;
  --md-ref-neutral0: #000;
  --md-ref-neutral10: #1a1c18;

  --md-sys-color-primary: var(--md-ref-primary40);
  --md-sys-color-primary-container: var(--md-ref-primary90);
  --md-sys-scolor-secondary: #55624b;
  --md-sys-color-secondary-container: var(--md-ref-secondary90);
  --md-sys-color-on-secondary-container: var(--md-ref-neutral10);

  --md-sys-color-background: var(--md-ref-neutral99);
  --md-sys-color-on-background: var(--md-ref-neutral10);
  --md-sys-color-surface: var(--md-ref-neutral99);

  --md-sys-font-family: Roboto, sans-serif;
  --md-sys-state-hover-alpha: 0.08;
  --md-sys-state-focused-alpha: 0.12;
  --md-sys-state-pressed-alpha: 0.16;
  --md-sys-shadow-key-alpha: 0.3;
  --md-sys-shadow-ambient-alpha: 0.15;

  --md-frame-shape-radius: 2rem;
  --md-fab-shape-radius: 1rem;
  --md-card-shape-radius: 1rem;
}

// elevation
// spec: https://material.io/design/environment/elevation.html#default-elevations
// spec: https://material.io/design/environment/light-shadows.html

// map structure:
// z-index: highlighting, (key shadow: x, blur radius, spread-radius), (ambient shadow)
$elevations: (
  0: 0
    (
      1 3 0
    )
    (
      4 8 3
    ),
  3: 0.15
    (
      1 3 0
    )
    (
      4 8 3
    )
);

@function shadow($shadow, $alpha) {
  @return 0px #{list.nth($shadow, 1)}px #{list.nth($shadow, 2)}px #{list.nth(
      $shadow,
      3
    )}px rgba(0, 0, 0, $alpha);
}

@mixin elevation-get($index: 0) {
  $elevation: map.get($elevations, $index);
  $highlight: list.nth($elevation, 1);
  box-shadow: shadow(list.nth($elevation, 2), var(--md-sys-shadow-key-alpha)),
    shadow(list.nth($elevation, 3), var(--md-sys-shadow-ambient-alpha));
}

// typography
@mixin headline-l {
  font: 400 2rem / 2.5rem var(--md-sys-font-family);
  letter-spacing: 0;
}

@mixin title-l {
  font: 400 1.375rem / 1.75rem var(--md-sys-font-family);
  letter-spacing: 0;
}

@mixin label-l {

}

// states
@mixin overlay-create($alpha: 0, $scale: 1) {
  &:after {
    pointer-events: none;
    content: "";
    opacity: $alpha;
    position: absolute;
    background-color: currentColor;
    transition: opacity 0.3s ease, transform 0.3s ease, background 0.3s ease;
    transform: scale($scale);
    top: 0;
    right: 0;
    bottom: 0;
    left: 0;
    border-radius: inherit;
  }
}

@mixin enabled($scale: 1) {
  @include overlay-create(0, $scale);
}

@mixin hover($scale: 1) {
  @include overlay-create(var(--md-sys-state-hover-alpha), $scale);
}

@mixin focused($scale: 1) {
  @include overlay-create(var(--md-sys-state-focused-alpha), $scale);
}

@mixin pressed($scale: 1) {
  @include overlay-create(var(--md-sys-state-pressed-alpha), $scale);
}

@mixin interactive {
  @include enabled;
  user-select: none;
  cursor: pointer;

  @media (hover) {
    &:hover {
      @include hover;
    }
  }

  &:focus,
  &.has-focus {
    @include focused;
  }

  &:active {
    @include pressed;
  }
}

── TSX (React) ─────────────────────────────────────────────
class FabContainer {
  constructor() {
    this.element = document.getElementById("fab-container");
    this.close = document.getElementById("close");
    this.overlay = this.element.querySelector(".fab-overlay");

    this.close.addEventListener("click", () => this.collapse());

    setTimeout(() => container.toggle(), 1000);
    setTimeout(() => container.toggle(), 1500);
  }

  get isExpanded() {
    return this.element.classList.contains("expanded");
  }

  expand() {
    const { element, overlay } = this;
    if (!element.classList.contains("expanded")) {
      overlay.style.setProperty("--top", `${overlay.offsetTop}px`);
      overlay.style.setProperty("--left", `${overlay.offsetLeft}px`);
      element.classList.add("expanded");
      element.classList.remove("collapse");
    }
  }

  collapse() {
    this.element.classList.add("collapse");
    this.element.classList.remove("expanded");
  }

  toggle() {
    this.isExpanded ? this.collapse() : this.expand();
  }

  reset() {
    this.overlay.style.removeProperty('--top');
    this.overlay.style.removeProperty('--left');
  }
}

const container = new FabContainer();

class Fab {
  constructor() {
    this.element = document.getElementById("fab");
  }
}

const fab = new Fab();
fab.element.addEventListener("click", () => {
  container.expand();
});

window.addEventListener("resize", () => {
  container.reset();
});

── TSX (React) ─────────────────────────────────────────────
document.querySelector("button.expand").addEventListener(
	"click",
	function (e) {
		e.preventDefault();
		e.stopPropagation();
		const button = e.currentTarget;
		button.classList.add("loading");
		button.disabled = true;
		setTimeout(() => {
			button.classList.add("loaded");
			setTimeout(() => {
				button.classList.add("finished");
				setTimeout(() => {
					button.classList.remove("finished");
					button.classList.remove("loaded");
					button.classList.remove("loading");
					button.disabled = false;
				}, 1500);
			}, 700);
		}, 1500);
	},
	false
);

[175]  Pure CSS Synthwave 80s Animation
